description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a large, rounded head and a small, squat body. The doll has pale skin, prominent dark circles around its half-closed blue eyes, and a neutral, slightly tired facial expression. Its hair is short, straight, and jet black, covering the top and back of the head. The doll is dressed in a dark outfit with a purple high-collared jacket, black pants, and visible white undershirt. The arms and hands are simple, with mitten-like hands and purple sleeves, while the legs are short and end in rounded feet. The overall appearance is cartoonish and plush-like, suggesting a soft, squeezable texture.
description: A cartoonish humanoid doll with a large black head, tired blue eyes, and a purple and black outfit. The design is plush-like with simple, rounded features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's facial features, purple jacket, and mitten-like hands clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, ear, and the profile of the purple sleeve and jacket collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back of the head, body, and the backs of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, and purple sleeve.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a high-collared purple jacket with visible seam details, black pants, and a white undershirt, evoking a casual, slightly gothic or anime-inspired streetwear style.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly bent and angled outward, legs apart, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral, tired expression with half-closed blue eyes, dark under-eye circles, and a straight, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, jet black hair with uneven bangs covering the forehead and extending around the head.
